arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with robot URDF/xacro files. Usually not set, it enables use of a custom description.

arg.name: description_file
arg.description: URDF/XACRO description file with the robot.

arg.name: prefix
arg.description: Prefix of the joint names, useful for multi-robot setup. If changed, joint names in controller config must also be updated.

arg.name: hardware
arg.description: Choose the type of hardware to start. Options: mock, motion_app, motor_direct.

let.name: robot_description
let.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) $(find-pkg-share $(var description_package))/urdf/$(var description_file) prefix:=$(var prefix) hardware:=$(var hardware)')
